creator: mi@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich (mail not working) from comment #4)
> Have you tested consumers aren't broken?

This reminds me of the old Soviet joke about a bureaucrat demanding, an applicant proves his "single" status by presenting an affidavit from ALL WOMEN stating, she is not his wife.

I tested with the vendor's own test-harness.

> But does x265 2.2 fix the build problem reported by Jan?

No, most likely not. I'm still working on that. May need to wait for lang/clang4...
